name: Reliable Credit Association Inc.
description_short: Reliable Credit is a direct personal loan lender and retail installment contract purchaser operating since 1958, offering loans and insurance products with multiple branch locations.
description_long:
Reliable Credit Association Inc. has been in operation since 1958, establishing itself as a finance company focused on cultivating long-term relationships with both consumers and dealers. The company positions itself around three core service pillars: originating direct loans to qualified consumers, purchasing retail installment contracts from approved dealers, and offering insurance products including vehicle, property, and business coverage.

The company's service offerings center on personal loans with a stated commitment to "Fast Friendly Service and Integrity Assured." They provide a secure online credit application process, online account access through eServices, and multiple payment options including mobile app, website, phone (with both virtual and live agents), mail, and in-person at branch locations. Their customer service team is available Monday through Friday, 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m., with Spanish-speaking representatives available.

What distinguishes Reliable Credit is its long operational history (66+ years), established branch network across multiple locations, and multiple service channels for both loan applications and payments. They offer 24/7 payment options through their virtual agent and mobile application, providing convenience beyond standard business hours. The company also bundles insurance products with loan services, offering a broader financial services approach.

As a personal loan lender, Reliable Credit lacks transparency on their website regarding specific loan amounts, APR ranges, credit score requirements, or repayment terms. While they market themselves as serving "a broad range of qualified consumers," no concrete lending criteria or loan products are detailed. The company appears to be a regional or mid-sized lender rather than a national platform, and their website provides limited information typical of modern fintech competitors, making it difficult for prospective borrowers to pre-assess eligibility or compare terms.
pros: 66+ years of operational history (since 1958) suggests stability and established market presence
Multiple payment channels including 24/7 virtual agent access at (503) 461-4114
Mobile app available for account access and payments with convenient digital management
Physical branch locations for in-person service and loan applications
Bilingual customer service with Spanish-speaking representatives available
Purchases retail installment contracts, providing alternative credit pathway through dealer relationships
Bundled insurance products (vehicle, property, business) available alongside lending
cons: No disclosed loan amounts, APR ranges, or repayment terms on website—transparency is minimal
Credit score requirements and eligibility criteria not published, making pre-qualification impossible
Limited to specific geographic areas (appears regional, not national) based on branch network references
No online loan status tracking or application progress visibility mentioned
Customer service limited to Monday-Friday 8:30 a.m.-5:30 p.m., creating gaps for urgent inquiries
best_for: Consumers in regions where Reliable Credit has established branch locations
Borrowers who prefer in-person interactions and established relationships over digital-native lenders
Consumers seeking bundled loan and insurance services from a single provider
Dealers and businesses seeking retail installment contract purchasing partnerships
diagnosis: Reliable Credit is best suited for borrowers in their service area who value personal relationships, physical branch access, and established lender stability over transparent online pricing and instant digital comparison. The main caveat is the complete absence of published lending terms—prospective borrowers must contact the company directly to learn loan amounts, rates, and requirements, making it impossible to pre-qualify or compare against competitors on their website alone.
services: Retail installment contract purchasing from approved dealers
eServices online account management and access
Mobile app for account management and payments
Phone-based payments with virtual or live agents
